name: Asihati Hazaiti
title: Software & Data Engineer
bio: Software developer and problem solver, passionate about data, robotics, and artificial intelligence. Currently pursuing an MSc in Intelligent Adaptive Systems at the University of Hamburg while building cross-platform apps at Simplience GmbH. Three years prior at ThoughtWorks China across banking security, retail migration, and government portals. Polyglot in five languages, fluent in shipping software.
